characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Blonde, Brunette, Redhead: Blonde Characterization Marches On: On the wiki it says that in the first season, she was an insecure, uptight, and slightly awkward weirdo. By the time of season 2, she's very neurotic, stubborn, and high-strung but has grown to be a bit more confident and fun. Everybody Hates Math:Except her apparently. One of her likes listed in the wikia is math. Ironicallyshe's not particularly good at it. Go-Getter Girl: Tends to be this, given her attitude with accomplishing achievements. Hidden Depths: She can sing, juggle and is a contortionist.She's also become quite the fashion designer in Season 3.

characters.name: Secondary Characters
characters.description: The Ace: She can do pretty much anything. Ditzy Genius: Her first appearance can make her seem airheaded when translating thoughts at times, but usuallysmarter thanTylerbecause of course, she is. Embarrassing Middle Name: Leslie. I Just Want to Have Friends: Almost everyone besides Stan and the recurring characters' parents; Bennett and Ellen see Karl out to be some kind of arch-nemesis when he means no harm. Parental Abandonment: His father is on a space station, and his mother trains for weight-lifting contests 24/7.

characters.name: Minor Characters
characters.description: Hoist by His Own Petard: A mistake on thefake backstoryhe mentioned manages to let Avery, Tyler and Chloe know that he'slying.Specifically,he tells Stan that if he comes back to Spokane, then he'll have a great view of the Puget Sound. Spokane is too far away from the coast to have a view of the Puget Sound, something anyone who actually lived there would know. I Lied:He actually wanted to take Stan back to experiment with him, NOT to take him back to his family. Sadistic Choice: While not as extreme as other examples, he gives Stan one of this in the season finale: He can either come back with him to meet his family and leave the one he currently has, or stay with them, but probably never see his real family again.And he does it again, only worse:Stan can either come back with him to get experimented on, or he'll experiment on Stan's puppies instead And he does it again, only worse:Stan can either come back with him to get experimented on, or he'll experiment on Stan's puppies instead The Dreaded: To Stan. This little piece of dialogue should be enough proof:Stan: Dr. Ian Calloway,AHHHHHHH!
